response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video content was analyzed. The first segment (00:00-04:05) consists of an introduction and curtain-opening sequence, containing no vocal music. 2. A 3D dance performance of the song 'Motteke! Sailor Fuku' begins at 04:05 and continues until the end of the video. 3. On-screen text identified the song as 'もってけ!セーラーふく' (Motteke! Sailor Fuku) with lyrics by '畑亜貴' (Aki Hata) and music by '神前暁' (Satoru Kosaki). 4. Searched for the lyrics of 'もってけ!セーラーふく' and found comprehensive versions in both Japanese and English. 5. JSON was structured with two scenes, correctly segmenting the instrumental intro and the vocal performance.
response.global_summary: A 3D live performance video titled 'T.A.N. The Autofister Network 3D LIVE' featuring various VTubers performing the song 'Motteke! Sailor Fuku'.

scenes.description: The video begins with an introductory segment featuring various VTubers. No singing occurs.
The VTubers perform a 3D dance cover of the song 'Motteke! Sailor Fuku', originally from the anime 'Lucky Star'. The performance takes place in various animated settings.
